design_notes: The intro (S0) sets up a relaxed pace with a slow 2-beat spacing pattern. The drop (S1) introduces structured, cascading 3-note sweeps that flow from left to right (GAP -> BAR -> NOTE) to emphasize the synth melody while maintaining a casual-friendly density. The outro (S2) shifts to alternating center-lane transitions and concludes with a playful sequence of steps, keeping the chart engaging but easy to navigate.

sections.name: Intro
sections.intent: Introduce basic rhythm with comfortable 2-beat spacing.

sections.name: Drop
sections.intent: Add flow and energy through gentle 3-note sweeps on the beat.

sections.name: Outro
sections.intent: Wind down with alternating lane movements and a clean resolution.
